channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Haaland Wins Democratic Primary; Hull Leads GOP in New Mexico Governor Race
item.description: Former Interior Secretary Deb Haaland secured the Democratic nomination for New Mexico governor, according to Newsmax projections.

item.title: Alme Cruises to Montana GOP Senate Primary Victory
item.description: Kurt Alme won Montana's GOP Senate primary on Tuesday, backed by President Donald Trump and Senator Steve Daines.

item.title: Jill Biden Regrets Not Discussing Son Hunter's Addiction More
item.description: Jill Biden expressed regret for not speaking more about her son Hunter's drug addiction during her White House tenure, citing a new perspective.

item.title: Supreme Court Allows Alabama GOP-Backed Congressional Map for Midterms
item.description: The Supreme Court permitted Alabama to use a 2023 congressional map with one majority-Black district, a win for Republicans ahead of midterms.
